scene_input.scene_summary: Muhammad meets a Christian monk, Baḥīrā, in a desert oasis.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Muhammad extending his hand in greeting

schema_output.scene_summary: Muhammad meets a Christian monk, Baḥīrā, in a desert oasis.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 32
schema_output.moral_lesson: Importance of open-mindedness and respect for other faiths.

characters.name: The Messenger
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: The Christian Monk
characters.appearance: older man with slightly stooped shoulders, wearing a simple brown robe and a white cloth head covering

schema_output.narrative_text: One sunny afternoon, the Messenger met a wise Christian monk, Baḥīrā, in a beautiful desert oasis. The Messenger was curious to learn about Baḥīrā's faith.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A serene desert oasis with towering palm trees, their trunks thick and gnarled, and their leaves a vibrant green. A small spring bubbles up from the earth, its crystal-clear water flowing gently into a shallow pool surrounded by smooth rocks. Late afternoon sunlight casts warm golden rays across the scene, illuminating the sand and the trees. In the foreground, two figures stand facing each other - the central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle greeting. Beside him, a bearded man with a kind face, dressed in simple brown robes and a white cloth head covering, turns to face the central figure with a look of curiosity and respect. Soft warm golden light, peaceful and serene mood. Medium close shot at eye level. Earthy tones, greens, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
